name: deep-search
author: hagency
description: Web search with parallel page content fetching. Searches the web, crawls top results, and saves full page content to local files for later reference.

tools.name: deep_search
tools.description: Search the web and crawl all result URLs in parallel. Saves each page as a markdown file under ./research/<query>/. Returns an index of saved files with inline previews -- use read_file to examine specific pages for detailed synthesis.

max_results.description: Number of results to search and crawl (1-10, default: 8)

search_engine.description: Preferred search engine: duckduckgo, brave, you, perplexity (default: auto-detect from available API keys)
